channel.title: fun touch os on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in fun touch os on Tech Tracker

item.title: Orgin os - vivo officially announced replacement of fun touch os !
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-zwEPKLgk4Ok/X5wkdUP3jYI/AAAAAAAACBE/ObNFSootBbcOWJm_4KlpzNL1yOj_RQUfgCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1604068466068534-0.png" alt=""> Vivo popularly known for thier camera oriented mobiles and blazing offline retail mobile sales using android based customised os called fun touch os till now, Funtouch os somehow managed to satisfy vivo mobile users but it lacks behind alot of other customized os’s like oxygen os or miui. This may be the reason or they even got bored of funtouch os like vivo users, vivo previous teased the new os but not announced but today vivo officialy announced funtouch os replacement named orgin os.
